title: Shotgun
why_this_song: Shotgun by George Ezra (2018) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "If you need me, you know where I'll be"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Feeling like a someone"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I'll be riding shotgun"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I'll be riding shotgun"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Underneath the hot sun"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "someone" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "someone" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Time flies by in the yellow and green

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Shotgun" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Shotgun" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Shotgun" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Shotgun", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Shotgun" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Shotgun" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
